title: Analytics Dashboard API
description: Build an analytics dashboard backend. Events table tracks page_url, event_type (pageview/click/signup), user_id, timestamp. POST /api/events logs events. GET /api/stats returns aggregated stats: total events, unique users, events per type. GET /api/stats/daily returns counts grouped by day. Auth required for stats endpoints.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique, email
  password, required

create a Events table:
  page_url, required
  event_type, required
  user_id
  timestamp

# POST /api/events (public)
# GET /api/stats (auth required)
# GET /api/stats/daily (auth required)
